text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Summer has ended. To sum it up, I would say...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha ha! It was the Summer of the
Overlord's Awakening!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa... Our dealings were very much
worth my time.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to her, I have been freed from the cursed
burden of overwhelming victory.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Yes! I no longer fear chaos and disorder!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I will sift through the dirt and grime so that I may
find a truly beautiful gemstone hidden beneath.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Be I the hunter or the hunted, I will stride boldly
down the center of my path and rout those who
challenge me. Right, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The way forward is revealed. From here on, T.M.
Opera O will assert not only her brilliance...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She'll walk the path of dominance as the
Overlord, with beauty and strength to match her
pride.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I am no longer the Overlord in the simplest sense.
No...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I want to be an overlord who thrives on the
razor's edge! A narrow margin will suffice for it is
my friend!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Now, Trainer. I require a new title.
choice_data_list: Oh! Uh, sure. Um, uhh... The Edgelord?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaa ha ha! Indeed, for I do always stand at the
precipice!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The thrill of knowing a single misstep will send me
tumbling...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, I cannot help but feel a more appropriate
title remains out there...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Yes—in the Japan Cup, I shall demonstrate to all
that I'm the Overlord of Ultimate Power!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Opera O turns her back and struts away.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In that moment, I could swear the word
"Centurial" had appeared across her back.
